title: Rebutia neocumingii
taxonomy: Rebutia neocumingii is a species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae. It is native to Bolivia and is often classified as a subgenus within the genus Rebutia. Within the Cactaceae family, Rebutia neocumingii is further classified in the subfamily Cactoideae. The species is also sometimes classified in the subgenus Rebutia subg. Rebutia. However, further classification within Rebutia may vary depending on the source and taxonomic system used.
